'''鈭歷-p-th''' ('''kavapath''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:elect|elect]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-p-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:elect|elect]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歷-p-th
|-
! Lemma
| kavapath
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thivapath|thivapath]] || [[word:jivapath|jivapath]] || [[word:shivapath|shivapath]] || [[word:kivapath|kivapath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuvapath|thuthuvapath]] || [[word:jujuvapath|jujuvapath]] || [[word:shushuvapath|shushuvapath]] || [[word:kukuvapath|kukuvapath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuvapath|thuvapath]] || [[word:juvapath|juvapath]] || [[word:shuvapath|shuvapath]] || [[word:kuvapath|kuvapath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuvapath|thuvapath]] || [[word:juvapath|juvapath]] || [[word:shuvapath|shuvapath]] || [[word:kuvapath|kuvapath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thevapath|thevapath]] || [[word:jevapath|jevapath]] || [[word:shevapath|shevapath]] || [[word:kevapath|kevapath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothovapath|thothovapath]] || [[word:jojovapath|jojovapath]] || [[word:shoshovapath|shoshovapath]] || [[word:kokovapath|kokovapath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thovapath|thovapath]] || [[word:jovapath|jovapath]] || [[word:shovapath|shovapath]] || [[word:kovapath|kovapath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thovapath|thovapath]] || [[word:jovapath|jovapath]] || [[word:shovapath|shovapath]] || [[word:kovapath|kovapath]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:vapath|vapath]] || [[word:vapath|vapath]] || [[word:vapath|vapath]] || [[word:vapath|vapath]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:vapath|vapath]] || [[word:vapath|vapath]] || [[word:vapath|vapath]] || [[word:vapath|vapath]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:vapath|vapath]] || [[word:vapath|vapath]] || [[word:vapath|vapath]] || [[word:vapath|vapath]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:vapath|vapath]] || [[word:vapath|vapath]] || [[word:vapath|vapath]] || [[word:vapath|vapath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙vapath|th忙vapath]] || [[word:j忙vapath|j忙vapath]] || [[word:sh忙vapath|sh忙vapath]] || [[word:k忙vapath|k忙vapath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathavapath|thathavapath]] || [[word:jajavapath|jajavapath]] || [[word:shashavapath|shashavapath]] || [[word:kakavapath|kakavapath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thavapath|thavapath]] || [[word:javapath|javapath]] || [[word:shavapath|shavapath]] || [[word:kavapath|kavapath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thavapath|thavapath]] || [[word:javapath|javapath]] || [[word:shavapath|shavapath]] || [[word:kavapath|kavapath]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shavapath|shavapath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshavapath|goshavapath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishavapath|gokishavapath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shavapathn眉|shavapathn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshavapathnkn眉|goshavapathnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishavapathn眉|gokishavapathn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shavapathsh毛|shavapathsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshavapathnksh毛|goshavapathnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishavapathsh毛|gokishavapathsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavapathro|shavapathro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavapathnkro|goshavapathnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavapathro|gokishavapathro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shavapathmu|shavapathmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavapathnkmu|goshavapathnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavapathmu|gokishavapathmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shavapathsher|shavapathsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshavapathnksher|goshavapathnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishavapathsher|gokishavapathsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shavapathng|shavapathng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshavapathnkng|goshavapathnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishavapathng|gokishavapathng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shavapathya|shavapathya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshavapathnkya|goshavapathnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishavapathya|gokishavapathya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shavapathyam|shavapathyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshavapathnkyam|goshavapathnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishavapathyam|gokishavapathyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavapathn眉sh毛|shavapathn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavapathnkn眉sh毛|goshavapathnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavapathn眉sh毛|gokishavapathn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavapathn眉ro|shavapathn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavapathnkn眉ro|goshavapathnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavapathn眉ro|gokishavapathn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavapathn眉mu|shavapathn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavapathnkn眉mu|goshavapathnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavapathn眉mu|gokishavapathn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavapathsh毛n眉|shavapathsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavapathnksh毛n眉|goshavapathnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavapathsh毛n眉|gokishavapathsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavapathsh毛ro|shavapathsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavapathnksh毛ro|goshavapathnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavapathsh毛ro|gokishavapathsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavapathsh毛mu|shavapathsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavapathnksh毛mu|goshavapathnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavapathsh毛mu|gokishavapathsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavapathron眉|shavapathron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavapathnkron眉|goshavapathnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavapathron眉|gokishavapathron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavapathrosh毛|shavapathrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavapathnkrosh毛|goshavapathnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavapathrosh毛|gokishavapathrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavapathromu|shavapathromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavapathnkromu|goshavapathnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavapathromu|gokishavapathromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavapathmun眉|shavapathmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavapathnkmun眉|goshavapathnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavapathmun眉|gokishavapathmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavapathmush毛|shavapathmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavapathnkmush毛|goshavapathnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavapathmush毛|gokishavapathmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavapathmuro|shavapathmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavapathnkmuro|goshavapathnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavapathmuro|gokishavapathmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a249b1f}}
